title: croton lanceolaris
intro: Croton lanceolaris, also known as the Asian Croton or Lance-Leafed Croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family Euphorbiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Croton lanceolaris include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
